It seems like the script on the final page is still breaking or freezing because AdGuard is active. > > Could you guys please test the full loop? > > Links to Test - > > https://vm-mrx-protection.vercel.app/token/aHR0cHM6Ly9NaW5pZnlVcmxzLmluL280VmxBZw.34452fc78ee8bc398aa8949525343adadd7c9b49377ac048c4f5432f74386d1c ### Screenshots
